summary: Iteration 4 testing: T+3 Kalman A³, PVI fields, Commander Console, ISO-8859-1 encoding resilience, on_bad_lines skip, rho_history t3 field, area chart T+3 legend, ghost trigger revenue counter. 25/25 backend tests passed. All 18 frontend checks passed.

minor.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody>, <tr> cannot be child of <span>. Functional, no crash, but produces HTML structure warnings.

action_items: Optional: Fix FailureTable.jsx table row rendering to avoid React hydration warning (span as tbody child)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: kalman_step() correctly implements A³ state-space: A=clip(1+avg_drift/z, 0.97, 1.06), rho_t3=clip(x̂×A³, 0,1), pvi=|z-rho_t3|×100 — all correct
server.py: _parse_csv_resilient() correctly implements UTF-8→ISO-8859-1→Windows-1252 fallback + on_bad_lines='skip' — all correct
server.py: rho_history entries include 't3': kalman['rho_t3'] — correct
Dashboard.jsx: CommanderConsole component correctly uses kState.kalman.rho_t3 for logic and display
HubCharts.jsx: t3_pct = (h.t3 ?? h.t1) * 100 fallback correctly handles old history entries without t3
DataInjection.jsx: readFileResilient() + sanitizeText() correctly at top of file, called in doUpload()

Note: Backend tests left test_corrupt_rows.csv as active dataset (n=270 initially). Ghost trigger inflated n_total to 3070 during testing. Frontend commander console correctly showed all 3 states during test run.

verified_features.backend_on_bad_lines_skip: PASS — CSV with extra columns in some rows returns 200, success=True
verified_features.kalman_rho_t3: PASS — kalman dict has rho_t3 (float in [0,1])
verified_features.kalman_pvi: PASS — kalman dict has pvi (non-negative float)
verified_features.kalman_A3: PASS — kalman dict has A3 = A^3 (verified mathematically)
verified_features.root_pvi_field: PASS — root level pvi float present
verified_features.root_pvi_alert_field: PASS — root level pvi_alert bool present, consistent with pvi > 15.0
verified_features.stable_message_optimal_flow: PASS — stable level → 'OPTIMAL FLOW' in message
verified_features.rho_history_t3_field: PASS — rho_history entries have t3 (float) field
verified_features.rho_history_t1_field: PASS — rho_history entries retain t1 field
verified_features.rho_history_full_schema: PASS — time, rho, t1, t3 all present in last 3 entries
verified_features.commander_console_t3_rho_shown: PASS — T+3 PROJ (135-MIN) section shows ρ=0.xxxx
verified_features.commander_console_optimal_flow_message: PASS — nominal state shows green 'MIMI KERNEL: OPTIMAL FLOW DETECTED. CERTAINTY 99.2%.'
verified_features.area_chart_t3_kalman_legend: PASS — area chart legend text shows 'T+3 KALMAN A³ (w=Xpx · Δ=Y%)'
verified_features.pvi_alert_banner_conditional: PASS — pvi-alert-banner NOT shown when pvi=0.1% (<15%), correctly conditional
verified_features.ghost_trigger_revenue_counter: PASS — revenue counter went from $425.52 → $1,154.42 in 10s of ghost activity
verified_features.ghost_trigger_commander_updates: PASS — T+3 ρ in commander console updated from 0.0999 → 0.4593 → 0.5180 across ghost cycles
verified_features.readFileResilient_in_source: PASS — readFileResilient() defined at line 7 of DataInjection.jsx, called in doUpload()
verified_features.schema_mapper_ui: PASS — SchemaMapper component renders with data-testid='schema-mapper' on SCHEMA_MISMATCH
verified_features.pdf_export_btn: PASS — export-pdf-btn visible, enabled, clickable with no errors

seed_data_creation: Backend tests uploaded test CSVs (test_weight.csv, test_cost.csv, test_corrupt_rows.csv). Ghost trigger inflated n_total to 3070. Backend state reset not done — app still functional with new data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 4 features verified: T+3 Kalman A³ (A, A3, rho_t3, pvi in kalman dict + root), PVI/pvi_alert at root, commander_message/commander_level (3 states: stable/critical/efficiency), ISO-8859-1 encoding + on_bad_lines skip, rho_history t3 field, T+3 KALMAN A³ in area chart legend, ghost trigger revenue counter, CommanderConsole UI data-testid. Backend dataset changed to test_corrupt_rows.csv by test uploads; ghost trigger inflated to 3070 rows. Current rho~0.026 due to test uploads with mostly on-time rows. Minor: React hydration warning in FailureTable for tr/span nesting. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_siti_iteration4.py
